**Thank you for contributing data to SpectroChemPy !**

- [ ] My data files are placed in the appropriate `testdata/<technique>/` directory
- [ ] I have verified the files are valid and readable
- [ ] (optional) I ran the maintenance scripts locally:
  ```bash
  python scripts/rename_without_space.py
  python scripts/create_index_in_folder.py
  ```

> **Note for maintainers:** Merging this PR to `master` will trigger an automatic release (bump version, tag, build, upload to Anaconda). No manual steps required.
